commands: bash -c 'set -e; rm -rf /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system /home/ubuntu/_clone_tmp; git clone https://github.com/yossi-gavriel/Surfing.git /home/ubuntu/_clone_tmp; mv /home/ubuntu/_clone_tmp/surf-ai-system /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system; mv /home/ubuntu/_clone_tmp/.git /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/; rm -rf /home/ubuntu/_clone_tmp; chown -R ubuntu:ubuntu /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system; tail -n +72 /var/lib/cloud/instance/scripts/part-001 > /tmp/resume.sh; bash /tmp/resume.sh; echo ===STATUS===; docker ps -a; systemctl is-active nginx; curl -s http://localhost:8000/health; systemctl is-active surf-ai-frontend'
